dfplayer_begin.message0: Initialize DFPlayer module %1 RX pin %2 TX pin %3
dfplayer_begin.tooltip: Initialize the DFPlayer Mini MP3 module and specify the serial port RX and TX pins

dfplayer_play.tooltip: Play the audio file with the specified number (1-3000)

dfplayer_volume_up.tooltip: Increase the volume by one level

dfplayer_loop.tooltip: Play the audio file with the specified number in a loop

dfplayer_play_folder.tooltip: Play the specified file in the specified folder

dfplayer_enable_loop_all.tooltip: Enable loop playback of all files

dfplayer_disable_loop_all.tooltip: Turn off all file loop playback

dfplayer_play_mp3_folder.message0: DFPlayer %1 play file %2 from MP3 folder
dfplayer_play_mp3_folder.tooltip: Play specified files in MP3 folder

dfplayer_advertise.tooltip: Interrupt advertising audio and continue with the original track after playing

dfplayer_stop_advertise.tooltip: Stop ad playback and restore original track

dfplayer_play_large_folder.message0: DFPlayer %1 play file %3 in large folder %2
dfplayer_play_large_folder.tooltip: Play specified files in a large folder (supports 3000 files)

dfplayer_loop_folder.tooltip: Loop through all files in a specified folder

dfplayer_enable_loop.tooltip: Start single loop of current track

dfplayer_disable_loop.tooltip: Close the current track single loop

dfplayer_read_file_counts.tooltip: Read the total number of files in the SD card

dfplayer_read_current_file_number.tooltip: Read the currently playing file number

dfplayer_read_file_counts_in_folder.message0: DFPlayer %1 read file counts in folder %2
dfplayer_read_file_counts_in_folder.tooltip: Read the number of files in the specified folder

dfplayer_available.tooltip: Check if there are any messages from the module

dfplayer_read_type.tooltip: Read message type (such as playback completed, SD card inserted, etc.)

dfplayer_read.tooltip: Read the parameter value of the message

dfplayer_simple_play.message0: Simple play: Initialize DFPlayer (RX: %1, TX: %2) and play file %3
dfplayer_simple_play.tooltip: Quickly initialize and play specified files
